name: The Sinners test a new E.G.O [Gone Wrong!!!]- Roseate Desire (Limbus Company)
description:
PROXY BOT- Use a Proxy for the real experience. I made this with DeepSeek in mind. JanitorAI's default bot CANNOT RUN THIS WELL, as it is too token-heavy.—————————————————————————————

limbus orgy? limborgy? lorgy? limgy? orpany? limor comgy?

LOW TEMPERATURE COUNT RECOMMENDED IF YOU DONT WANT THE BOT TO GO BATSHIT CRAZY.

You're a Sinner. Dante extracted a new E.G.O and you guys try and test it together. I'M HORNY IDC IF IT DOESN'T MAKE SENSE!

(yalls gotta use ur imagination for the others)
